description_long: This modern bungalow features a single-story layout with a flat roof and expansive floor-to-ceiling windows along its facades, allowing for abundant natural light. The structure is elongated, with a large outdoor deck area that includes a swimming pool and a driveway with a parked car. The exterior is finished in a combination of light and dark materials, likely concrete, glass, and metal, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. The interior appears open-plan, with visible living, dining, and kitchen spaces, as well as private rooms sectioned off. A small balcony or patio area is present, and the property is enclosed by low fencing. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A sleek, modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, and an expansive outdoor deck featuring a pool and driveway. The design highlights open-plan living and strong indoor-outdoor connectivity.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bungalow, the outdoor pool, driveway with car, and extensive glass windows.
description_view_1: Angled view from the rear corner, highlighting the open-plan interior, pool, and patio area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the long facade with grouped windows and the pool area at the far end.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the driveway, main entrance, pool, and the main outdoor living space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows along the facades
